views.label: Dashboard
views.content: Mine status report with 6 stat cells, activity log (7 entries), quick action buttons

views.label: Projects
views.content: Searchable project registry table with 5 rows, status badges, create button

views.label: Project Workspace
views.content: Split shaft navigation + assay report with metadata, tags, tech stack, collaborators, goals

views.label: Kanban
views.content: 4-column board: Backlog(3), In Progress(2), Review(2), Done(3) with priority badges

views.label: Whiteboard
views.content: Architecture map with 6 positioned nodes, SVG connection lines, toolbar with 6 tools

views.label: Schema Planner
views.content: 5 entity blocks (User, Project, Idea, KanbanCard, WhiteboardNode) with PK/FK badges, 7 relationships

views.label: Directory Tree
views.content: Expandable tree output with 3 collapsible folders, 22+ files across 4 directories

views.label: Ideas
views.content: Terminal capture form (title, desc, priority, tags) + 7 ideas with priority/status indicators

views.label: AI Chat
views.content: 6 chat messages (3 user, 3 AI) with tool action blocks (add_kanban_card, add_idea, generate_tree)

views.label: Settings
views.content: 5 config groups: Account, Subscription, Preferences (toggles), Integrations (4 services), Data Management

interactions.buttonHover: amber text brightens, underline appears character by character via CSS ::after width transition
interactions.buttonClick: spark flash — amber background flashes via keyframe animation
interactions.cardHover: amber border illuminates card edges with subtle box-shadow
interactions.pageTransition: typewriter cascade — old view hides, new content appears line by line with stagger
interactions.scrollReveal: content lines appear sequentially with translateX slide
interactions.navItemHover: key badge gets amber glow via box-shadow
interactions.navItemActive: full amber background on key badge
interactions.inputFocus: border-bottom turns amber, caret color set to accent
interactions.toggleSwitch: text toggles [ON]/[OFF] with amber/dim color swap
interactions.tooltips: title attributes on nav buttons with shortcut key info
interactions.loadingState: CSS animated ellipsis via keyframe content change
interactions.idleAmbient: blinking underscore cursor at bottom of terminal via step animation
interactions.microFeedback: [OK] text briefly appears in accent2 color, then fades out

responsive.desktop: 1536px+ — full terminal, 6-column stat grid, full ASCII art
responsive.mobile: 390px — 5x2 nav grid, single-column layouts, compact ASCII art
